mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.booking_id, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at, b.user_id AS student_id, u.name AS student_name FROM review r JOIN booking b ON r.booking_id = b.id JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.id JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id WHERE l.user_id = #{tutorId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.id, r.booking_id, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at, b.user_id AS student_id, u.name AS student_name FROM review r JOIN booking b ON r.booking_id = b.id JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.id JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id WHERE r.booking_id = #{bookingId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM review ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT r.* FROM review r JOIN booking b ON r.booking_id = b.id JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id WHERE l.user_id = #{tutorId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
